title: Nether Improvements
description: Configurable, survival friendly tweaks to make the Nether more interesting on Vanilla servers!
body:
# Nether Improvements

Spice up your nether on survival servers (smps)! This is perfect for vanilla+ servers, and allows you to tweak and change a few things related to mobs in the nether!

## Current Features

- Piglin brutes can naturally spawn (rare chance)
- Ghast fireballs have increased damage and destruction
- Wither skeletons with fire bows can replace normal skeletons in the Soul biome

## Upcoming Features

- More damage from nether mobs
- More scary ghasts
- Suggest more on the github please!


## ❤️ Credits:

Developed by DerexXD, Logo art by ommer15. 

This was created for use on our forever world, called "derex smp", and now I am sharing it with the world. The server is named after the COVID-era derex smp [sic], a Minecraft survival multiplayer server that ran from summer 2020 to early 2022, filled with lore, drama, and memories. It succeeded an earlier server, Aperture Science, which ran from 2017 to 2018.
